subject: ARALING_PANLIPUNAN
title: Important Land and Water Forms
objective: Ipaliwanag ang posibleng ugnayan ng anyong lupa/tubig sa pagkain, biyahe, habitat, at libangan.
introduction: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad. You will explore examples, sort cards, practice, and answer five questions.

vocabulary.definition: A key word used in the lesson “Important Land and Water Forms”.
A key word used in the lesson “Important Land and Water Forms”.
A key word used in the lesson “Important Land and Water Forms”.

activities.instruction: Pag-aralan ang ideya at pakinggan ang salaysay.
activities.content: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: Text alternative: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

activities.instruction: Suriin ang bawat learning token at basahin ang mga halimbawa.
activities.accessibilityAlternative: A numbered list of the same examples is available for keyboard and screen-reader use.

activities.instruction: Ilagay ang bawat card sa “angkop” o “hindi angkop.”

doesNotFit: Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho

feedback.correct: Your groups follow the lesson rule.
feedback.retry: Use the explanation, not color or position.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Tap an item and then tap a labeled category; dragging is optional.

options: Ang ilog ay maaaring makatulong sa biyahe.
Lahat ng tao sa ilog ay bangkero.

feedback.correct: Correct: Ang ilog ay maaaring makatulong sa biyahe.

activities.instruction: Itambal ang bawat halimbawa sa ideya ng aralin.

feedback.retry: Return to the explanation and compare one pair at a time.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: A list-based matching control replaces drag gestures.

activities.instruction: Tapusin nang sunod-sunod ang gabay na balik-aral.

feedback.correct: You are ready for the five-question check.

activities.accessibilityAlternative: Up and down buttons provide an alternative to dragging.

items.prompt: Aling pahayag ang pinakaangkop sa “Important Land and Water Forms”?

options.text: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.
Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho

items.explanation: The correct response is “Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

options.text: Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho

items.explanation: The correct response is “ilog maaaring daanan” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

items.prompt: Alin ang hindi sumusunod sa ideya ng aralin?

options.text: Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho

items.explanation: The correct response is “Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

options.text: Ang ilog ay maaaring makatulong sa biyahe.
Lahat ng tao sa ilog ay bangkero.

items.explanation: The correct response is “Ang ilog ay maaaring makatulong sa biyahe.” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

items.prompt: Aling halimbawa ang dapat gamitin sa huling balik-aral?

options.text: Lahat ng residente pareho ang trabaho

items.explanation: The correct response is “baybayin maaaring tirahan ng organism” because it follows the lesson explanation: Gumamit ng “maaaring” at ebidensya; iwasang gawing stereotype ang komunidad.

assetSpecs.prompt: Friendly Grade 3 cartoon storybook concept board for Important Land and Water Forms; rounded shapes, warm dark-brown outlines, tropical palette, no embedded text, uncluttered small-screen layout. Compose overlays provide labels and interactive targets.
assetSpecs.contentDescription: Five connected learning tokens for exploring examples in Important Land and Water Forms.
